cards.name: Ace of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: delays, blocks, lack of passion, lack of energy, hesitancy, creative blocks

cards.name: King of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: greed, materialistic, wasteful, chauvanist, poor financial decisions, gambler, exploitative, possessive

cards.name: 4 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: possessiveness, insecurity, hoarding, stinginess, stability, security, savings, materialism, wealth, frugality, boundaries, guardedness
